seoTitle: Calder Park vs California Gully — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Calder Park and California Gully. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Calder Park vs California Gully: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Calder Park and California Gully.
heading: Calder Park vs California Gully — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Calder Park, Victoria and California Gully, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: California Gully has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Calder Park (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Calder Park or California Gully safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Calder Park has a flood risk score of 59/100, while California Gully scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Calder Park scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. California Gully scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Calder Park or California Gully?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. California Gully has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
